ai_summary: Aeroflex Enterprises Limited has allotted 79,200 equity shares under its Employee Stock Option Plan 2024 following the exercise of options by eligible employees. This routine corporate action, compliant with SEBI regulations, results in a minor approximately 0.07% dilution of the company's total paid-up share capital and generated Rs. 33.66 lakhs in cash. The stated diluted earnings per share (standalone basis) post-allotment is Rs. 0.97, with no red flags identified.
